options.text: I notice where things could still be improved.
options.text_en: I notice where things could still be improved.
options.text_zh: 我会留意哪里还能再改进。

options.text: When I make decisions, I also consider what could go wrong.
options.text_en: When I make decisions, I also consider what could go wrong.
options.text_zh: 我做决定时会把“万一呢”也考虑进去。

options.text: I would rather life feel full of options and possibilities.
options.text_en: I would rather life feel full of options and possibilities.
options.text_zh: 我更希望人生是充满选项和可能性的。

options.text: I actively try to bring people closer together.
options.text_en: I actively try to bring people closer together.
options.text_zh: 我会主动拉近人与人之间的距离。

options.text: I am very interested in how something actually works.
options.text_en: I am very interested in how something actually works.
options.text_zh: 我对“这件事到底是怎么运作的”很有兴趣。

options.text: I work to come across as professional and capable.
options.text_en: I work to come across as professional and capable.
options.text_zh: 我会努力让自己表现得专业、能干。

options.text: I do not like forcing myself into an overly ordinary template.
options.text_en: I do not like forcing myself into an overly ordinary template.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢把自己压进过于普通的模板里。

options.text: Sometimes I put things off because I want to avoid extra hassle.
options.text_en: Sometimes I put things off because I want to avoid extra hassle.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会因为想省心而拖一拖。

options.text: I like opening new possibilities as I move forward.
options.text_en: I like opening new possibilities as I move forward.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢一边走一边打开新的可能。

options.text: I like things to move in a clear direction.
options.text_en: I like things to move in a clear direction.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢事情朝着明确方向推进。

options.text: I want to be reliable and principled.
options.text_en: I want to be reliable and principled.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己是个可靠、讲规矩的人。

options.text: I like to think things through before deciding what to do.
options.text_en: I like to think things through before deciding what to do.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢先把事情想清楚，再决定怎么做。

options.text: When choosing, I often wonder whether there is a better possibility.
options.text_en: When choosing, I often wonder whether there is a better possibility.
options.text_zh: 我做选择时常会想还有没有更好的可能。

options.text: I want to matter to the people around me.
options.text_en: I want to matter to the people around me.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己在别人心里是有分量的。

options.text: I can usually switch quickly into getting-things-done mode.
options.text_en: I can usually switch quickly into getting-things-done mode.
options.text_zh: 我通常能很快进入“把事办成”的模式。

options.text: I am usually not afraid to make my position clear.
options.text_en: I am usually not afraid to make my position clear.
options.text_zh: 我通常不怕表明自己的态度。

options.text: In groups, I naturally tend to play a supportive role.
options.text_en: In groups, I naturally tend to play a supportive role.
options.text_zh: 我在人群里常会自然地扮演支持者。

options.text: I like to leave myself quiet space to think.
options.text_en: I like to leave myself quiet space to think.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢给自己留出安静思考的空间。

options.text: I see a sense of uniqueness as part of my self-worth.
options.text_en: I see a sense of uniqueness as part of my self-worth.
options.text_zh: 我会把独特感看成自我价值的一部分。

options.text: I tend to see life as a course that needs continual improvement.
options.text_en: I tend to see life as a course that needs continual improvement.
options.text_zh: 我习惯把人生当成一场需要持续升级的赛程。

options.text: I like states that feel simple, steady, and low-conflict.
options.text_en: I like states that feel simple, steady, and low-conflict.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢简单、安稳、没有太多拉扯的状态。

options.text: I naturally look toward the lighter, more positive side.
options.text_en: I naturally look toward the lighter, more positive side.
options.text_zh: 我会自然地往轻松、积极的方向看。

options.text: Sometimes I keep a fair amount of distance from the people around me.
options.text_en: Sometimes I keep a fair amount of distance from the people around me.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会和周围的人保持较远的距离。

options.text: Sometimes I neglect myself because I am taking care of others.
options.text_en: Sometimes I neglect myself because I am taking care of others.
options.text_zh: 我有时会因为顾着别人而忽略自己。

options.text: I tend to encourage myself by looking forward to the future.
options.text_en: I tend to encourage myself by looking forward to the future.
options.text_zh: 我习惯用期待未来来给自己打气。

options.text: I value long-term security more than short-term satisfaction.
options.text_en: I value long-term security more than short-term satisfaction.
options.text_zh: 我会把长期保障看得比一时痛快更重要。

options.text: I can usually keep myself fairly steady.
options.text_en: I can usually keep myself fairly steady.
options.text_zh: 我通常能让自己保持比较平稳的状态。

options.text: I hold myself to standards because I want to do things well.
options.text_en: I hold myself to standards because I want to do things well.
options.text_zh: 我会为了把事情做好而自我要求。

options.text: I want to be an influential person in a group.
options.text_en: I want to be an influential person in a group.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己在群体中是有影响力的人。

options.text: When I judge something, I look first at evidence and logic.
options.text_en: When I judge something, I look first at evidence and logic.
options.text_zh: 我做判断时会先看证据和逻辑。

options.text: When life feels too plain, I feel something is missing.
options.text_en: When life feels too plain, I feel something is missing.
options.text_zh: 当生活太平淡时，我会觉得少了点什么。

options.text: Sometimes I use toughness as a way to protect myself.
options.text_en: Sometimes I use toughness as a way to protect myself.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会把强硬当成保护自己的方式。

options.text: I am more likely to understand a problem first through relationships.
options.text_en: I am more likely to understand a problem first through relationships.
options.text_zh: 我更容易先从关系的角度理解问题。

options.text: I would rather spend time on things that produce results.
options.text_en: I would rather spend time on things that produce results.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意把时间花在能带来产出的事上。

options.text: I naturally pay attention to what might happen next.
options.text_en: I naturally pay attention to what might happen next.
options.text_zh: 我会自然地关注接下来可能发生什么。

options.text: I care whether something feels real enough and emotionally alive.
options.text_en: I care whether something feels real enough and emotionally alive.
options.text_zh: 我会在意一件事是否足够真、足够有感觉。

options.text: I do not like beating around the bush.
options.text_en: I do not like beating around the bush.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢拐弯抹角。

options.text: I feel satisfied when I understand something clearly.
options.text_en: I feel satisfied when I understand something clearly.
options.text_zh: 我会因为弄懂一件事而感到满足。

options.text: I value lasting standards more than short-term convenience.
options.text_en: I value lasting standards more than short-term convenience.
options.text_zh: 我更看重长期的规范，而不是一时的省事。

options.text: Rather than pushing myself forward first, I want everyone to feel comfortable.
options.text_en: Rather than pushing myself forward first, I want everyone to feel comfortable.
options.text_zh: 比起抢先出头，我更希望大家都能舒服一点。

options.text: Sometimes my attention scatters because I do not want to miss out.
options.text_en: Sometimes my attention scatters because I do not want to miss out.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会因为不想错过而分散了注意力。

options.text: When others hold back and do not take a stand, I tend to step forward first.
options.text_en: When others hold back and do not take a stand, I tend to step forward first.
options.text_zh: 别人退缩不表态时，我会忍不住先出头。

options.text: I am more used to observing first, then participating.
options.text_en: I am more used to observing first, then participating.
options.text_zh: 我更习惯先观察，再参与。

options.text: I prefer a clear way of doing things with standards.
options.text_en: I prefer a clear way of doing things with standards.
options.text_zh: 我更偏好清晰、有标准的做事方式。

options.text: I trust action and responsibility more than discussion alone.
options.text_en: I trust action and responsibility more than discussion alone.
options.text_zh: 我更相信行动和担当，而不只是讨论。

options.text: I care a lot about whether I am helpful to the people around me.
options.text_en: I care a lot about whether I am helpful to the people around me.
options.text_zh: 我很看重自己是否对身边人有帮助。

options.text: Sometimes I act more slowly because I am thinking too much.
options.text_en: Sometimes I act more slowly because I am thinking too much.
options.text_zh: 我有时会因为想得太多而行动得慢一点。

options.text: When others are too casual, I feel a bit uneasy inside.
options.text_en: When others are too casual, I feel a bit uneasy inside.
options.text_zh: 别人太随意时，我心里会有点别扭。

options.text: I am generally gentle and easy to get along with.
options.text_en: I am generally gentle and easy to get along with.
options.text_zh: 我待人时一般比较温和、好相处。

options.text: I tend to be considerate and proactive with people.
options.text_en: I tend to be considerate and proactive with people.
options.text_zh: 我待人时会比较体贴和主动。

options.text: I think it is important to maintain boundaries and rules.
options.text_en: I think it is important to maintain boundaries and rules.
options.text_zh: 我觉得守住边界和规则很重要。

options.text: I do not like other people deciding for me.
options.text_en: I do not like other people deciding for me.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢别人替我做主。

options.text: I often express care by giving to others.
options.text_en: I often express care by giving to others.
options.text_zh: 我常通过付出来表达在意。

options.text: I am more likely to spend time studying a problem than managing appearances.
options.text_en: I am more likely to spend time studying a problem than managing appearances.
options.text_zh: 我更容易把时间花在研究问题，而不是经营场面。

options.text: Sometimes I keep myself in a constant sprint.
options.text_en: Sometimes I keep myself in a constant sprint.
options.text_zh: 我有时会让自己一直处在冲刺状态。

options.text: When certain emotions arise, it is hard for me to step away at once.
options.text_en: When certain emotions arise, it is hard for me to step away at once.
options.text_zh: 有些情绪一上来，会让我很难一下子抽离。

options.text: I do not like making the atmosphere too tense.
options.text_en: I do not like making the atmosphere too tense.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢把气氛搞得太紧张。

options.text: I like having something exciting in the day.
options.text_en: I like having something exciting in the day.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢让一天里有些让人兴奋的东西。

options.text: I place a lot of importance on maintaining relationships.
options.text_en: I place a lot of importance on maintaining relationships.
options.text_zh: 我会把维护关系看得比较重要。

options.text: I feel safer in an environment with rules and structure.
options.text_en: I feel safer in an environment with rules and structure.
options.text_zh: 我更安心于有规则、有结构的环境。

options.text: I am usually sensitive to emotions and atmosphere.
options.text_en: I am usually sensitive to emotions and atmosphere.
options.text_zh: 我对情绪和氛围通常很敏感。

options.text: I usually act with restraint and principles.
options.text_en: I usually act with restraint and principles.
options.text_zh: 我做事时通常很有分寸和原则。

options.text: I do not like being trapped in heavy emotions for too long.
options.text_en: I do not like being trapped in heavy emotions for too long.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢被沉重的情绪困太久。

options.text: Sometimes I value efficiency more than feelings.
options.text_en: Sometimes I value efficiency more than feelings.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会把效率看得比感受更重要。

options.text: I want to be someone who feels warm to others.
options.text_en: I want to be someone who feels warm to others.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己能成为让人感觉温暖的人。

options.text: I would rather go slower and find what truly fits me.
options.text_en: I would rather go slower and find what truly fits me.
options.text_zh: 我宁可慢一点，也想找到真正契合自己的东西。

options.text: When I have not achieved results, I feel dissatisfied with myself.
options.text_en: When I have not achieved results, I feel dissatisfied with myself.
options.text_zh: 没做出成绩时，我会对自己不太满意。

options.text: When I do not meet my own standards, I feel dissatisfied with myself.
options.text_en: When I do not meet my own standards, I feel dissatisfied with myself.
options.text_zh: 没做到自己标准时，我会对自己不太满意。

options.text: For me, understanding my own heart matters more than reaching a quick conclusion.
options.text_en: For me, understanding my own heart matters more than reaching a quick conclusion.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，理解自己的心，比尽快给出结论更重要。

options.text: I usually place a lot of importance on feeling strong.
options.text_en: I usually place a lot of importance on feeling strong.
options.text_zh: 我通常会把力量感看得很重要。

options.text: I do not like staying in daydreams; I want to act as soon as possible.
options.text_en: I do not like staying in daydreams; I want to act as soon as possible.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢停留在空想里，更想尽快行动。

options.text: I often proactively ask what others need.
options.text_en: I often proactively ask what others need.
options.text_zh: 我常会主动询问别人需要什么。

options.text: I am more likely to claim space through action than wait for others to give it.
options.text_en: I am more likely to claim space through action than wait for others to give it.
options.text_zh: 我更容易通过行动争取空间，而不是等别人给。

options.text: I care more about whether the whole situation is harmonious than whether I personally win.
options.text_en: I care more about whether the whole situation is harmonious than whether I personally win.
options.text_zh: 我更在意整体是不是和谐，而不只是我个人有没有赢。

options.text: I usually move toward clear goals.
options.text_en: I usually move toward clear goals.
options.text_zh: 我通常会朝着明确目标推进。

options.text: When others need help, I am usually willing to lend a hand.
options.text_en: When others need help, I am usually willing to lend a hand.
options.text_zh: 别人需要帮忙时，我通常愿意搭把手。

options.text: I usually work according to a plan and steps.
options.text_en: I usually work according to a plan and steps.
options.text_zh: 我做事通常按计划和步骤推进。

options.text: I do not like trapping myself in a single option.
options.text_en: I do not like trapping myself in a single option.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢把自己困在单一选项里。

options.text: I want my efforts to be seen.
options.text_en: I want my efforts to be seen.
options.text_zh: 我会希望自己的付出能被看见。

options.text: I care whether others see me as capable.
options.text_en: I care whether others see me as capable.
options.text_zh: 我会在意别人是否把我看成有能力的人。

options.text: I prefer to understand myself through my inner feelings.
options.text_en: I prefer to understand myself through my inner feelings.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意按照内心感受来理解自己。

options.text: When things become dull, I look for a way to change the pace.
options.text_en: When things become dull, I look for a way to change the pace.
options.text_zh: 当事情变得沉闷时，我会想办法换个节奏。

options.text: I want to become someone trustworthy.
options.text_en: I want to become someone trustworthy.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己能成为值得信赖的人。

options.text: When an opportunity appears, I usually try to seize it.
options.text_en: When an opportunity appears, I usually try to seize it.
options.text_zh: 遇到机会时，我通常会想办法抓住它。

options.text: For me, preserving energy and boundaries is important.
options.text_en: For me, preserving energy and boundaries is important.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，保留精力和边界很重要。

options.text: I want to avoid people and situations that feel oppressive.
options.text_en: I want to avoid people and situations that feel oppressive.
options.text_zh: 我会想避开让我感到压抑的人和场景。

options.text: I prefer to maintain a smooth state with little friction.
options.text_en: I prefer to maintain a smooth state with little friction.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意维持一种顺畅、没有太多摩擦的状态。

options.text: For me, achievement often comes from proving that I did it.
options.text_en: For me, achievement often comes from proving that I did it.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，成就感往往来自被证明“我做到了”。

options.text: I usually respect real strength more than surface politeness.
options.text_en: I usually respect real strength more than surface politeness.
options.text_zh: 我通常更尊重真实的力量，而不是表面的客套。

options.text: I value long-term stability.
options.text_en: I value long-term stability.
options.text_zh: 我比较看重长期的稳定感。

options.text: I care whether people's feelings are cared for, not only whether the task is finished.
options.text_en: I care whether people's feelings are cared for, not only whether the task is finished.
options.text_zh: 我更在意人心有没有被照顾到，而不只是事情有没有完成。

options.text: I usually value calm and steadiness.
options.text_en: I usually value calm and steadiness.
options.text_zh: 我通常把平静和安稳看得很重要。

options.text: Sometimes I worry that I am not prepared enough.
options.text_en: Sometimes I worry that I am not prepared enough.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会担心自己准备得还不够。

options.text: Sometimes I feel like an observer who cannot fit into the group in front of me.
options.text_en: Sometimes I feel like an observer who cannot fit into the group in front of me.
options.text_zh: 我有时会觉得自己像个旁观者，融不进眼前的圈子。

options.text: I want life to feel interesting and energetic.
options.text_en: I want life to feel interesting and energetic.
options.text_zh: 我更想让日子过得有趣、有活力。

options.text: I want to keep an observable and understandable distance from the world.
options.text_en: I want to keep an observable and understandable distance from the world.
options.text_zh: 我希望和世界保持一种可观察、可理解的距离。

options.text: When others take a stronger attitude, I may just let it pass.
options.text_en: When others take a stronger attitude, I may just let it pass.
options.text_zh: 别人态度强一点时，我可能就让过去了。

options.text: Sometimes I place too much importance on being needed.
options.text_en: Sometimes I place too much importance on being needed.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会把“被需要”看得太重要。

options.text: I would rather move slower so things are more stable and complete.
options.text_en: I would rather move slower so things are more stable and complete.
options.text_zh: 我宁可慢一点，也希望事情更稳妥、更到位。

options.text: I care more about whether the result is strong than whether the process is comfortable.
options.text_en: I care more about whether the result is strong than whether the process is comfortable.
options.text_zh: 比起过程是否舒服，我更在意结果是否漂亮。

options.text: I usually give people a sense of being stable and low-drama.
options.text_en: I usually give people a sense of being stable and low-drama.
options.text_zh: 我通常给人一种稳定、不折腾的感觉。

options.text: I have a drive to push forward.
options.text_en: I have a drive to push forward.
options.text_zh: 我身上有一股往前冲的劲儿。

options.text: I spend time confirming whether a person or situation is trustworthy.
options.text_en: I spend time confirming whether a person or situation is trustworthy.
options.text_zh: 我会花时间确认一个人或一件事是否值得信任。

options.text: I am more easily drawn by fun things than intimidated by responsibility.
options.text_en: I am more easily drawn by fun things than intimidated by responsibility.
options.text_zh: 我更容易被好玩的事吸引，而不是被责任吓住。

options.text: I do not like being forced to make decisions quickly.
options.text_en: I do not like being forced to make decisions quickly.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢被逼着很快做决定。

options.text: Sometimes I put strong pressure on myself to win.
options.text_en: Sometimes I put strong pressure on myself to win.
options.text_zh: 我有时会给自己很强的赢的压力。

options.text: I am more easily attracted to people and things with character and flavor.
options.text_en: I am more easily attracted to people and things with character and flavor.
options.text_zh: 我更容易被有个性、有味道的人事物吸引。

options.text: I more easily notice changes in other people's emotions.
options.text_en: I more easily notice changes in other people's emotions.
options.text_zh: 我更容易注意到别人的情绪变化。

options.text: I do not like letting others see what I am not good at.
options.text_en: I do not like letting others see what I am not good at.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢让别人看到自己不擅长的一面。

options.text: I check repeatedly because I do not want mistakes.
options.text_en: I check repeatedly because I do not want mistakes.
options.text_zh: 我会反复检查，是因为不想出差错。

options.text: I prefer to build a sense of security through understanding.
options.text_en: I prefer to build a sense of security through understanding.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意凭理解来建立安全感。

options.text: I want my life to carry a distinct personal color.
options.text_en: I want my life to carry a distinct personal color.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己的人生带着鲜明的个人色彩。

options.text: I like to confirm first that a plan is thorough enough.
options.text_en: I like to confirm first that a plan is thorough enough.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢先确认计划是否足够周全。

options.text: I care whether I leave an impression of competence.
options.text_en: I care whether I leave an impression of competence.
options.text_zh: 我在意自己是否给人留下能干的印象。

options.text: For me, good enough is not easy to accept.
options.text_en: For me, good enough is not easy to accept.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，“差不多就行”并不容易。

options.text: Sometimes I hold back from expressing myself to keep the peace.
options.text_en: Sometimes I hold back from expressing myself to keep the peace.
options.text_zh: 我有时会为了维持和气而不太表达自己。

options.text: I am not very convinced by reasons like everyone does it this way.
options.text_en: I am not very convinced by reasons like everyone does it this way.
options.text_zh: 我对“别人都这样”这类理由并不太买账。

options.text: I often use planning and preparation to reassure myself.
options.text_en: I often use planning and preparation to reassure myself.
options.text_zh: 我常会通过规划和准备来让自己安心。

options.text: I like to stay mentally clear and objective.
options.text_en: I like to stay mentally clear and objective.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢保持头脑上的清晰和客观。

options.text: I tend to handle problems in a calm way.
options.text_en: I tend to handle problems in a calm way.
options.text_zh: 我更倾向于用平和的方式处理问题。

options.text: Sometimes I feel different from the people around me.
options.text_en: Sometimes I feel different from the people around me.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会觉得自己和周围的人不太一样。

options.text: Sometimes I feel a little disappointed when others do not need me.
options.text_en: Sometimes I feel a little disappointed when others do not need me.
options.text_zh: 别人不需要我时，我偶尔会有点失落。

options.text: I like to break problems apart and examine them.
options.text_en: I like to break problems apart and examine them.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢把问题拆开来看。

options.text: When things are uncertain, I tend to make a judgment quickly.
options.text_en: When things are uncertain, I tend to make a judgment quickly.
options.text_zh: 我习惯在不确定时尽快做出判断。

options.text: My inner experience is usually quite rich.
options.text_en: My inner experience is usually quite rich.
options.text_zh: 我内心的体验通常比较丰富。

options.text: I usually prepare in advance for uncertain situations.
options.text_en: I usually prepare in advance for uncertain situations.
options.text_zh: 我通常会为不确定的情况先做准备。

options.text: If others are cold toward me, I care about it.
options.text_en: If others are cold toward me, I care about it.
options.text_zh: 如果别人对我冷淡，我会有点在意。

options.text: When I see something irregular, I cannot help wanting to correct it.
options.text_en: When I see something irregular, I cannot help wanting to correct it.
options.text_zh: 看到不规范的地方，我会忍不住想纠正。

options.text: I am more likely to adapt to an environment than force it to change.
options.text_en: I am more likely to adapt to an environment than force it to change.
options.text_zh: 我更容易去适应环境，而不是强行改变环境。

options.text: I prefer to take control proactively rather than wait passively.
options.text_en: I prefer to take control proactively rather than wait passively.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意主动掌控，而不是被动等待。

options.text: I can often see something worth looking forward to in a situation.
options.text_en: I can often see something worth looking forward to in a situation.
options.text_zh: 我往往能在事情里看到值得期待的一面。

options.text: I am willing to acknowledge the complex side of myself.
options.text_en: I am willing to acknowledge the complex side of myself.
options.text_zh: 我愿意承认自己复杂的一面。

options.text: I would rather be a little busy than remain stuck for a long time.
options.text_en: I would rather be a little busy than remain stuck for a long time.
options.text_zh: 我宁可忙一点，也不想长期停滞不前。

options.text: I want to be someone who can carry responsibility and make decisions.
options.text_en: I want to be someone who can carry responsibility and make decisions.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己是能扛事、能做主的人。

options.text: I tend to finish what is my responsibility first.
options.text_en: I tend to finish what is my responsibility first.
options.text_zh: 我习惯先完成分内该做的事。

options.text: I do not like states that feel too uniform or repetitive.
options.text_en: I do not like states that feel too uniform or repetitive.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢太过千篇一律的状态。

options.text: I like finding patterns in complex information.
options.text_en: I like finding patterns in complex information.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢从复杂信息里梳理出规律。

options.text: I take seriously the responsibilities I should carry.
options.text_en: I take seriously the responsibilities I should carry.
options.text_zh: 我会认真守住自己该负的责任。

options.text: Sometimes I take on too much responsibility.
options.text_en: Sometimes I take on too much responsibility.
options.text_zh: 我有时会把责任扛得太满。

options.text: Sometimes I put pressure on others by being too direct.
options.text_en: Sometimes I put pressure on others by being too direct.
options.text_zh: 我有时会因为太直接而让人有压力。

options.text: I like being someone others can rely on.
options.text_en: I like being someone others can rely on.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢成为别人可以依靠的人。

options.text: When doing things, I usually do not rush to take the lead.
options.text_en: When doing things, I usually do not rush to take the lead.
options.text_zh: 我做事时通常不急着抢主导权。

options.text: I care a lot about whether a person lives sincerely and with a sense of self.
options.text_en: I care a lot about whether a person lives sincerely and with a sense of self.
options.text_zh: 我很看重一个人是否活得真诚、有自我。

options.text: I want to be efficient and able to make things happen.
options.text_en: I want to be efficient and able to make things happen.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己是高效、能成事的人。

options.text: Sometimes I pursue what feels good first and consider other things later.
options.text_en: Sometimes I pursue what feels good first and consider other things later.
options.text_zh: 我有时会先追求感觉好，再考虑别的。

options.text: Sometimes I think of the worst possibility first.
options.text_en: Sometimes I think of the worst possibility first.
options.text_zh: 我有时会先想到最坏的可能。

options.text: I want to be understood as my real self, not just as a label.
options.text_en: I want to be understood as my real self, not just as a label.
options.text_zh: 我更希望被理解成真正的我，而不只是一个标签。

options.text: I do not like being pulled into intense opposition.
options.text_en: I do not like being pulled into intense opposition.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢被卷进强烈的对立里。

options.text: I would rather put things on the table and speak clearly.
options.text_en: I would rather put things on the table and speak clearly.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意把话摊开说清楚。

options.text: I actively look for opportunities to move myself further.
options.text_en: I actively look for opportunities to move myself further.
options.text_zh: 我会主动寻找让自己更进一步的机会。

options.text: I prefer to put my attention on the next thing worth looking forward to.
options.text_en: I prefer to put my attention on the next thing worth looking forward to.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意把注意力放在下一件值得期待的事上。

options.text: For me, having fewer emotional waves inside is comfortable in itself.
options.text_en: For me, having fewer emotional waves inside is comfortable in itself.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，心里没那么多波澜本身就是一种舒服。

options.text: I am usually willing to give a little more for relationships.
options.text_en: I am usually willing to give a little more for relationships.
options.text_zh: 我通常愿意为关系多付出一点。

options.text: When problems arise, I tend to step up proactively.
options.text_en: When problems arise, I tend to step up proactively.
options.text_zh: 遇到问题时，我往往会主动顶上去。

options.text: I first assess whether I have enough information before taking a position.
options.text_en: I first assess whether I have enough information before taking a position.
options.text_zh: 我会先评估自己是否有足够的信息再表态。

options.text: I usually do not want to stay in low moods for too long.
options.text_en: I usually do not want to stay in low moods for too long.
options.text_zh: 我通常不想在低落情绪里停太久。

options.text: Before acting, I tend to look at risks and consequences first.
options.text_en: Before acting, I tend to look at risks and consequences first.
options.text_zh: 我做事前会习惯先看风险和后果。

options.text: I care a lot about warmth between people.
options.text_en: I care a lot about warmth between people.
options.text_zh: 我很重视人与人之间的温度。

options.text: For me, knowing why is often as important as knowing what to do.
options.text_en: For me, knowing why is often as important as knowing what to do.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，知道为什么，往往和知道做什么一样重要。

options.text: I would rather face things directly than bend around them while feeling wronged.
options.text_en: I would rather face things directly than bend around them while feeling wronged.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意正面碰撞，也不想委屈着绕过去。

options.text: I keep investing energy in important goals.
options.text_en: I keep investing energy in important goals.
options.text_zh: 我会为重要目标持续投入精力。

options.text: I do not like making relationships become rigid or strained.
options.text_en: I do not like making relationships become rigid or strained.
options.text_zh: 我不喜欢把关系弄得很僵。

options.text: I want to live with integrity and standards.
options.text_en: I want to live with integrity and standards.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己活得端正、有标准。

options.text: Rather than looking at risks first, I more easily see opportunities first.
options.text_en: Rather than looking at risks first, I more easily see opportunities first.
options.text_zh: 比起先看风险，我更容易先看机会。

options.text: I can usually sense where something may not be right.
options.text_en: I can usually sense where something may not be right.
options.text_zh: 我通常能察觉哪里可能不太对劲。

options.text: I usually stand up at key moments.
options.text_en: I usually stand up at key moments.
options.text_zh: 我通常会在关键时刻站出来。

options.text: I tend to set staged goals for myself.
options.text_en: I tend to set staged goals for myself.
options.text_zh: 我会习惯给自己设定阶段性目标。

options.text: I want what I express to carry my own mark.
options.text_en: I want what I express to carry my own mark.
options.text_zh: 我希望表达出来的东西是有我自己痕迹的。

options.text: I usually speak and act directly.
options.text_en: I usually speak and act directly.
options.text_zh: 我说话做事通常比较直接。

options.text: I have trouble accepting something I know is wrong and settling for it anyway.
options.text_en: I have trouble accepting something I know is wrong and settling for it anyway.
options.text_zh: 我不太能接受明知不对还将就。

options.text: I do not like frequently changing ways of doing things that are already familiar.
options.text_en: I do not like frequently changing ways of doing things that are already familiar.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢频繁改变已经熟悉的做法。

options.text: I do not want to live as a standard answer.
options.text_en: I do not want to live as a standard answer.
options.text_zh: 我不太想把自己活成一个“标准答案”。

options.text: I do not like feeling optional in a relationship.
options.text_en: I do not like feeling optional in a relationship.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢自己在关系里是可有可无的。

options.text: When facing uncertainty, an alarm goes off inside me first.
options.text_en: When facing uncertainty, an alarm goes off inside me first.
options.text_zh: 面对不确定时，我心里会先拉起警报。

options.text: I usually place a lot of importance on a sense of freedom.
options.text_en: I usually place a lot of importance on a sense of freedom.
options.text_zh: 我通常会把自由感看得很重要。

options.text: I am more moved by inner resonance than by surface-level standard answers.
options.text_en: I am more moved by inner resonance than by surface-level standard answers.
options.text_zh: 我更容易被内心的共鸣打动，而不是表面的标准答案。

options.text: I like to sort out the process before acting.
options.text_en: I like to sort out the process before acting.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢先把流程理顺再行动。

options.text: When I do things, I first consider whether they will affect others.
options.text_en: When I do things, I first consider whether they will affect others.
options.text_zh: 我做事时会先考虑这会不会影响别人。

options.text: I am not used to showing vulnerability easily.
options.text_en: I am not used to showing vulnerability easily.
options.text_zh: 我不太习惯把脆弱轻易露出来。

options.text: I want my efforts to be seen and recognized.
options.text_en: I want my efforts to be seen and recognized.
options.text_zh: 我会希望自己的努力是被看见、被认可的。

options.text: I can sense subtle emotions that others may not notice.
options.text_en: I can sense subtle emotions that others may not notice.
options.text_zh: 我能感受到别人不太会留意到的细微情绪。

options.text: I can focus for a long time on problems that interest me.
options.text_en: I can focus for a long time on problems that interest me.
options.text_zh: 我能长时间专注在自己感兴趣的问题上。

options.text: I am not willing to keep myself trapped in boredom and restriction for long.
options.text_en: I am not willing to keep myself trapped in boredom and restriction for long.
options.text_zh: 我不太愿意把自己长期困在无聊和受限里。

options.text: When facing disagreement, I first try to slow things down.
options.text_en: When facing disagreement, I first try to slow things down.
options.text_zh: 面对分歧时，我会先想办法缓一缓。

options.text: I naturally take care of the people around me.
options.text_en: I naturally take care of the people around me.
options.text_zh: 我很自然地会去照顾身边的人。

options.text: I care a lot about doing things correctly.
options.text_en: I care a lot about doing things correctly.
options.text_zh: 我很在意把事情做对。

options.text: Sometimes I go along with others without being very clear about what I want.
options.text_en: Sometimes I go along with others without being very clear about what I want.
options.text_zh: 我有时会顺着别人走，却没那么清楚自己想要什么。

options.text: If I have not thought it through, I do not like taking a position in a hurry.
options.text_en: If I have not thought it through, I do not like taking a position in a hurry.
options.text_zh: 如果没有想明白，我不太愿意仓促表态。

options.text: When I encounter conflict, I usually do not back down too quickly.
options.text_en: When I encounter conflict, I usually do not back down too quickly.
options.text_zh: 我遇到冲突时，通常不会退得太快。

options.text: I often include other people's needs in my own plans.
options.text_en: I often include other people's needs in my own plans.
options.text_zh: 我常会把他人的需要放进自己的安排里。

options.text: I like seeing myself keep moving upward.
options.text_en: I like seeing myself keep moving upward.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢看到自己不断向上移动。

options.text: I would rather try moving forward than stay stuck in place.
options.text_en: I would rather try moving forward than stay stuck in place.
options.text_zh: 我宁可往前试一试，也不太想被困在原地。

options.text: I may linger for a long time on people or things I have lost.
options.text_en: I may linger for a long time on people or things I have lost.
options.text_zh: 我会对失去的人或事停留很久。

options.text: I do not like others suddenly intruding into my rhythm.
options.text_en: I do not like others suddenly intruding into my rhythm.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢别人突然闯进我的节奏里。

options.text: I usually first look for how to prevent conflict from escalating.
options.text_en: I usually first look for how to prevent conflict from escalating.
options.text_zh: 我通常会先看怎么避免冲突升级。

options.text: I place a lot of importance on protecting what already exists.
options.text_en: I place a lot of importance on protecting what already exists.
options.text_zh: 我会把保护已有的东西看得很重要。

options.text: I like helping others feel cared for and looked after.
options.text_en: I like helping others feel cared for and looked after.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢让别人感到被关心、被照顾。

options.text: I take my genuine inner feelings seriously.
options.text_en: I take my genuine inner feelings seriously.
options.text_zh: 我会认真对待自己内心真实的感受。

options.text: Sometimes I would rather observe than get involved immediately.
options.text_en: Sometimes I would rather observe than get involved immediately.
options.text_zh: 我有时会更愿意旁观，而不是立刻卷进去。

options.text: I do not easily take risks lightly.
options.text_en: I do not easily take risks lightly.
options.text_zh: 我不太容易对风险掉以轻心。

options.text: I am more used to taking charge of a situation than being pushed by it.
options.text_en: I am more used to taking charge of a situation than being pushed by it.
options.text_zh: 我更习惯掌握局面，而不是被局面推着走。

options.text: I am easily energized by possibilities and new ideas.
options.text_en: I am easily energized by possibilities and new ideas.
options.text_zh: 我很容易被可能性和新点子点燃。

options.text: When progress is not visible, I get a bit restless.
options.text_en: When progress is not visible, I get a bit restless.
options.text_zh: 当进展不明显时，我会有点焦躁。

options.text: When the outside world is too noisy or demanding, I want to retreat to my own space.
options.text_en: When the outside world is too noisy or demanding, I want to retreat to my own space.
options.text_zh: 当外界太吵或要求太多时，我会想退回自己的空间。

options.text: I naturally protect the people or things I believe in.
options.text_en: I naturally protect the people or things I believe in.
options.text_zh: 我会自然地去维护自己认定的人或事。

options.text: I spend time experiencing changes in my emotions.
options.text_en: I spend time experiencing changes in my emotions.
options.text_zh: 我会花时间体会自己的情绪变化。

options.text: I am easily attracted to interesting new experiences.
options.text_en: I am easily attracted to interesting new experiences.
options.text_zh: 我很容易被有趣的新体验吸引。

options.text: I am sensitive to details and quality.
options.text_en: I am sensitive to details and quality.
options.text_zh: 我对细节和质量比较敏感。

options.text: I am more likely to put safety and responsibility first.
options.text_en: I am more likely to put safety and responsibility first.
options.text_zh: 我更容易把“安全”和“责任”放在前面。

options.text: In a group, I am willing to take on the role of looking after others.
options.text_en: In a group, I am willing to take on the role of looking after others.
options.text_zh: 在团体里，我愿意承担照应别人的角色。

options.text: I can often make the atmosphere feel lighter.
options.text_en: I can often make the atmosphere feel lighter.
options.text_zh: 我常能把气氛带得更轻松一些。

options.text: I like keeping myself in a state of progress.
options.text_en: I like keeping myself in a state of progress.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢让自己处在有进展的状态里。

options.text: I do not like being restricted or pushed down.
options.text_en: I do not like being restricted or pushed down.
options.text_zh: 我不喜欢自己被限制、被压着走。

options.text: Sometimes I may seem a little cold or detached.
options.text_en: Sometimes I may seem a little cold or detached.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会显得有点冷淡或抽离。

options.text: When doing things, I value results and effectiveness.
options.text_en: When doing things, I value results and effectiveness.
options.text_zh: 我做事时很看重结果和成效。

options.text: I value reliability, steadiness, and predictability.
options.text_en: I value reliability, steadiness, and predictability.
options.text_zh: 我很重视可靠、稳妥和可预期。

options.text: Rather than worrying too much, I want to get things moving first.
options.text_en: Rather than worrying too much, I want to get things moving first.
options.text_zh: 比起顾虑太多，我更想先把事推动起来。

options.text: When there is disagreement, I stick to what I believe is right.
options.text_en: When there is disagreement, I stick to what I believe is right.
options.text_zh: 遇到分歧时，我会坚持自己认为对的做法。

options.text: I am sensitive to safety boundaries and bottom lines.
options.text_en: I am sensitive to safety boundaries and bottom lines.
options.text_zh: 我对安全边界和底线比较敏感。

options.text: I usually approach new things with curiosity.
options.text_en: I usually approach new things with curiosity.
options.text_zh: 我通常带着好奇心去接近新事物。

options.text: I tend to understand problems at the level of their essence.
options.text_en: I tend to understand problems at the level of their essence.
options.text_zh: 我更倾向于从本质层面理解问题。

options.text: I often think about what I truly want.
options.text_en: I often think about what I truly want.
options.text_zh: 我常会思考自己真正想要的是什么。

options.text: I pay attention to whether others recognize and accept me.
options.text_en: I pay attention to whether others recognize and accept me.
options.text_zh: 我会留心别人是否认可我、接纳我。

options.text: When life becomes too repetitive, I get a bit restless.
options.text_en: When life becomes too repetitive, I get a bit restless.
options.text_zh: 当生活太重复时，我会有点坐不住。

options.text: I can get along fairly naturally with different kinds of people.
options.text_en: I can get along fairly naturally with different kinds of people.
options.text_zh: 我能和不同类型的人相处得比较自然。

options.text: I work to make myself and the people around me feel more secure.
options.text_en: I work to make myself and the people around me feel more secure.
options.text_zh: 我会努力让自己和身边的人更有保障。

options.text: I would rather do the right thing than just the easy thing.
options.text_en: I would rather do the right thing than just the easy thing.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意做正确的事，而不只是轻松的事。

options.text: Rather than act immediately, I want to build clear understanding first.
options.text_en: Rather than act immediately, I want to build clear understanding first.
options.text_zh: 比起立刻行动，我更希望先建立清楚的理解。

options.text: Sometimes I become overly cautious because I consider too many concerns.
options.text_en: Sometimes I become overly cautious because I consider too many concerns.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会因为顾虑太多而变得谨慎过头。

options.text: I do not want relationships to become tense because of different positions.
options.text_en: I do not want relationships to become tense because of different positions.
options.text_zh: 我不太想让关系因为立场不同变得紧张。

options.text: I prefer to prove myself through results.
options.text_en: I prefer to prove myself through results.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意用结果来证明自己。

options.text: I like leaving flexibility and space for the future.
options.text_en: I like leaving flexibility and space for the future.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢给未来留出弹性和空间。

options.text: I am usually drawn to knowledge, principles, and systems.
options.text_en: I am usually drawn to knowledge, principles, and systems.
options.text_zh: 我通常会被知识、原理和系统吸引。

options.text: I notice whether someone is being overlooked.
options.text_en: I notice whether someone is being overlooked.
options.text_zh: 我会留意别人有没有被忽略。

options.text: I usually first ask whether something is reasonable, then whether it is convenient.
options.text_en: I usually first ask whether something is reasonable, then whether it is convenient.
options.text_zh: 我通常先看一件事是否合理，再看它是否方便。

options.text: I care more about being real than about appearing to fit in.
options.text_en: I care more about being real than about appearing to fit in.
options.text_zh: 比起看起来合群，我更在意自己是不是真实。

options.text: It satisfies me when others feel a little more at ease because of me.
options.text_en: It satisfies me when others feel a little more at ease because of me.
options.text_zh: 让别人因为我而轻松一点，会让我很满足。

options.text: I usually take initiative to bring freshness into life.
options.text_en: I usually take initiative to bring freshness into life.
options.text_zh: 我通常会主动给生活找点新鲜感。

options.text: I prefer to put my energy into things that are truly worth studying.
options.text_en: I prefer to put my energy into things that are truly worth studying.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意把精力投向真正值得研究的事情。

options.text: I care more about whether things can move forward smoothly.
options.text_en: I care more about whether things can move forward smoothly.
options.text_zh: 我更在意事情能否平稳推进。

options.text: Sometimes I cannot decide for a long time because I am trying to think too thoroughly.
options.text_en: Sometimes I cannot decide for a long time because I am trying to think too thoroughly.
options.text_zh: 我有时会因为想得太周全而迟迟定不下来。

options.text: I check repeatedly because I worry I may not have done something well enough.
options.text_en: I check repeatedly because I worry I may not have done something well enough.
options.text_zh: 我会反复检查，怕自己哪里没做好。

options.text: I tend to focus on how to win the next step.
options.text_en: I tend to focus on how to win the next step.
options.text_zh: 我习惯把注意力放在下一步怎么赢。

options.text: I often first go along with the overall arrangement.
options.text_en: I often first go along with the overall arrangement.
options.text_zh: 我常会先顺着整体的安排走。

options.text: I tend to be decisive when making decisions.
options.text_en: I tend to be decisive when making decisions.
options.text_zh: 我做决定时往往比较果断。

options.text: I have a strong feel for aesthetics and uniqueness.
options.text_en: I have a strong feel for aesthetics and uniqueness.
options.text_zh: 我对美感和独特性比较有感觉。

options.text: When making decisions, I often consider what will be most effective.
options.text_en: When making decisions, I often consider what will be most effective.
options.text_zh: 我做决定时常会考虑什么最有效。

options.text: When making decisions, I consider whether they align with principles.
options.text_en: When making decisions, I consider whether they align with principles.
options.text_zh: 我做决定时会考虑是否合乎原则。

options.text: I am usually willing to leave room for others.
options.text_en: I am usually willing to leave room for others.
options.text_zh: 我通常愿意给别人留余地。

options.text: I like things that have personal character and soul.
options.text_en: I like things that have personal character and soul.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢那些有个人气质、有灵魂的东西。

options.text: For me, having a clear position matters more than pleasing everyone.
options.text_en: For me, having a clear position matters more than pleasing everyone.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，立场清楚比讨所有人喜欢更重要。

options.text: For me, joy often comes from exploration and expansion.
options.text_en: For me, joy often comes from exploration and expansion.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，快乐常常来自探索和展开。

options.text: I prefer to follow a familiar, comfortable rhythm.
options.text_en: I prefer to follow a familiar, comfortable rhythm.
options.text_zh: 我更喜欢按照熟悉、舒服的节奏来。

options.text: I often keep in mind what should be done.
options.text_en: I often keep in mind what should be done.
options.text_zh: 我常把“应该怎么做”放在心上。

options.text: I usually pursue insight before visibility.
options.text_en: I usually pursue insight before visibility.
options.text_zh: 我通常先追求洞见，而不是声量。

options.text: I want to be someone others admire and pay attention to.
options.text_en: I want to be someone others admire and pay attention to.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己是别人会佩服、会关注的人。

options.text: Sometimes I seem forceful because I want to move things forward so much.
options.text_en: Sometimes I seem forceful because I want to move things forward so much.
options.text_zh: 我有时会因为太想推进而显得强势。

options.text: If clear support is lacking, I feel uneasy.
options.text_en: If clear support is lacking, I feel uneasy.
options.text_zh: 如果缺乏清晰支持，我会不太踏实。

options.text: I tend to adjust gradually based on what already exists.
options.text_en: I tend to adjust gradually based on what already exists.
options.text_zh: 我更倾向于在现有基础上慢慢调整。

options.text: I prefer depth over buzz.
options.text_en: I prefer depth over buzz.
options.text_zh: 我更偏好深度而不是热闹。

options.text: I often proactively make things more orderly and standardized.
options.text_en: I often proactively make things more orderly and standardized.
options.text_zh: 我常会主动把事情整理得更规范。

options.text: I usually think ahead about where problems may arise.
options.text_en: I usually think ahead about where problems may arise.
options.text_zh: 我通常会提前想到可能出问题的地方。

options.text: Sometimes I would rather be stronger than appear weak.
options.text_en: Sometimes I would rather be stronger than appear weak.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会宁愿强一点，也不想显得软弱。

options.text: Sometimes I put avoiding conflict too far ahead of other concerns.
options.text_en: Sometimes I put avoiding conflict too far ahead of other concerns.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会把“别起冲突”放得太前面。

options.text: Rather than taking a big risk, I value moving forward steadily.
options.text_en: Rather than taking a big risk, I value moving forward steadily.
options.text_zh: 比起冒险一把，我更看重稳稳地走下去。

options.text: I treat self-improvement as a long-term project.
options.text_en: I treat self-improvement as a long-term project.
options.text_zh: 我会把自我完善当成长期课题。

options.text: I like keeping life fluid and changing.
options.text_en: I like keeping life fluid and changing.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢让生活保持流动和变化。

options.text: I am usually willing to think independently instead of rushing to follow the crowd.
options.text_en: I am usually willing to think independently instead of rushing to follow the crowd.
options.text_zh: 我通常愿意独立思考，不急着跟风。

options.text: Rather than pleasing others, I care more about having a clear conscience.
options.text_en: Rather than pleasing others, I care more about having a clear conscience.
options.text_zh: 比起讨好别人，我更在意问心无愧。

options.text: Rather than making things look impressive, I care more about whether people are cared for.
options.text_en: Rather than making things look impressive, I care more about whether people are cared for.
options.text_zh: 比起把事情做得漂亮，我更在意人是不是被照顾到。

options.text: Sometimes I become sensitive because I care too much about feelings.
options.text_en: Sometimes I become sensitive because I care too much about feelings.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会因为太在意感受而变得敏感。

options.text: Sometimes I spread out too many plans at once.
options.text_en: Sometimes I spread out too many plans at once.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会一下子铺开太多计划。

options.text: I usually ask whether there will be a problem before asking whether it can be faster.
options.text_en: I usually ask whether there will be a problem before asking whether it can be faster.
options.text_zh: 我通常先问“会不会有问题”，再问“能不能更快”。

options.text: I would rather be direct than hide what I really mean.
options.text_en: I would rather be direct than hide what I really mean.
options.text_zh: 我宁可直一点，也不太想把真实意思藏着。

options.text: I am willing to put in extra effort for a higher standard.
options.text_en: I am willing to put in extra effort for a higher standard.
options.text_zh: 我愿意为更高标准多花一点力气。

options.text: I like producing visible results.
options.text_en: I like producing visible results.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢把事情做出看得见的成果。

options.text: I am used to preparing backup plans.
options.text_en: I am used to preparing backup plans.
options.text_zh: 我习惯准备备用方案。

options.text: I do not like being overly interrupted or forced to socialize.
options.text_en: I do not like being overly interrupted or forced to socialize.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢被过度打扰或被迫社交。

options.text: Sometimes it is hard for me to refuse other people's requests.
options.text_en: Sometimes it is hard for me to refuse other people's requests.
options.text_zh: 我有时很难拒绝别人提出的请求。

options.text: When others are vague, I get a bit impatient.
options.text_en: When others are vague, I get a bit impatient.
options.text_zh: 当别人含糊不清时，我会有点不耐烦。

options.text: I tend to confirm that the foundation is stable before rushing forward.
options.text_en: I tend to confirm that the foundation is stable before rushing forward.
options.text_zh: 我更倾向于先确认基础稳不稳，再往前冲。

options.text: I place a lot of importance on intellectual independence.
options.text_en: I place a lot of importance on intellectual independence.
options.text_zh: 我很看重自己思想上的独立性。

options.text: Sometimes I quickly shift my attention so I do not feel bad.
options.text_en: Sometimes I quickly shift my attention so I do not feel bad.
options.text_zh: 我有时会为了不难受而赶紧转移注意力。

options.text: I do not easily ignore obvious mistakes.
options.text_en: I do not easily ignore obvious mistakes.
options.text_zh: 我不容易对明显的错误视而不见。

options.text: For me, peace of mind often comes from predictability and preparation.
options.text_en: For me, peace of mind often comes from predictability and preparation.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，安心感往往来自可预见和有准备。

options.text: I want life to have familiarity and continuity.
options.text_en: I want life to have familiarity and continuity.
options.text_zh: 我希望生活能有熟悉感和可延续性。

options.text: Sometimes I feel that others do not truly understand me.
options.text_en: Sometimes I feel that others do not truly understand me.
options.text_zh: 我有时会觉得别人并不真正懂我。

options.text: Sometimes I become tense because I want to do things too well.
options.text_en: Sometimes I become tense because I want to do things too well.
options.text_zh: 我有时会因为太想做好而绷得很紧。

options.text: 我会留意哪里还能再改进。
options.text_en: I notice where things could still be improved.
options.text_zh: 我会留意哪里还能再改进。

options.text: 我做决定时会把“万一呢”也考虑进去。
options.text_en: When I make decisions, I also consider what could go wrong.
options.text_zh: 我做决定时会把“万一呢”也考虑进去。

options.text: 我更希望人生是充满选项和可能性的。
options.text_en: I would rather life feel full of options and possibilities.
options.text_zh: 我更希望人生是充满选项和可能性的。

options.text: 我会主动拉近人与人之间的距离。
options.text_en: I actively try to bring people closer together.
options.text_zh: 我会主动拉近人与人之间的距离。

options.text: 我对“这件事到底是怎么运作的”很有兴趣。
options.text_en: I am very interested in how something actually works.
options.text_zh: 我对“这件事到底是怎么运作的”很有兴趣。

options.text: 我会努力让自己表现得专业、能干。
options.text_en: I work to come across as professional and capable.
options.text_zh: 我会努力让自己表现得专业、能干。

options.text: 我不太喜欢把自己压进过于普通的模板里。
options.text_en: I do not like forcing myself into an overly ordinary template.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢把自己压进过于普通的模板里。

options.text: 我偶尔会因为想省心而拖一拖。
options.text_en: Sometimes I put things off because I want to avoid extra hassle.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会因为想省心而拖一拖。

options.text: 我喜欢一边走一边打开新的可能。
options.text_en: I like opening new possibilities as I move forward.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢一边走一边打开新的可能。

options.text: 我喜欢事情朝着明确方向推进。
options.text_en: I like things to move in a clear direction.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢事情朝着明确方向推进。

options.text: 我希望自己是个可靠、讲规矩的人。
options.text_en: I want to be reliable and principled.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己是个可靠、讲规矩的人。

options.text: 我喜欢先把事情想清楚，再决定怎么做。
options.text_en: I like to think things through before deciding what to do.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢先把事情想清楚，再决定怎么做。

options.text: 我做选择时常会想还有没有更好的可能。
options.text_en: When choosing, I often wonder whether there is a better possibility.
options.text_zh: 我做选择时常会想还有没有更好的可能。

options.text: 我希望自己在别人心里是有分量的。
options.text_en: I want to matter to the people around me.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己在别人心里是有分量的。

options.text: 我通常能很快进入“把事办成”的模式。
options.text_en: I can usually switch quickly into getting-things-done mode.
options.text_zh: 我通常能很快进入“把事办成”的模式。

options.text: 我通常不怕表明自己的态度。
options.text_en: I am usually not afraid to make my position clear.
options.text_zh: 我通常不怕表明自己的态度。

options.text: 我在人群里常会自然地扮演支持者。
options.text_en: In groups, I naturally tend to play a supportive role.
options.text_zh: 我在人群里常会自然地扮演支持者。

options.text: 我喜欢给自己留出安静思考的空间。
options.text_en: I like to leave myself quiet space to think.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢给自己留出安静思考的空间。

options.text: 我会把独特感看成自我价值的一部分。
options.text_en: I see a sense of uniqueness as part of my self-worth.
options.text_zh: 我会把独特感看成自我价值的一部分。

options.text: 我习惯把人生当成一场需要持续升级的赛程。
options.text_en: I tend to see life as a course that needs continual improvement.
options.text_zh: 我习惯把人生当成一场需要持续升级的赛程。

options.text: 我喜欢简单、安稳、没有太多拉扯的状态。
options.text_en: I like states that feel simple, steady, and low-conflict.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢简单、安稳、没有太多拉扯的状态。

options.text: 我会自然地往轻松、积极的方向看。
options.text_en: I naturally look toward the lighter, more positive side.
options.text_zh: 我会自然地往轻松、积极的方向看。

options.text: 我偶尔会和周围的人保持较远的距离。
options.text_en: Sometimes I keep a fair amount of distance from the people around me.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会和周围的人保持较远的距离。

options.text: 我有时会因为顾着别人而忽略自己。
options.text_en: Sometimes I neglect myself because I am taking care of others.
options.text_zh: 我有时会因为顾着别人而忽略自己。

options.text: 我习惯用期待未来来给自己打气。
options.text_en: I tend to encourage myself by looking forward to the future.
options.text_zh: 我习惯用期待未来来给自己打气。

options.text: 我会把长期保障看得比一时痛快更重要。
options.text_en: I value long-term security more than short-term satisfaction.
options.text_zh: 我会把长期保障看得比一时痛快更重要。

options.text: 我通常能让自己保持比较平稳的状态。
options.text_en: I can usually keep myself fairly steady.
options.text_zh: 我通常能让自己保持比较平稳的状态。

options.text: 我会为了把事情做好而自我要求。
options.text_en: I hold myself to standards because I want to do things well.
options.text_zh: 我会为了把事情做好而自我要求。

options.text: 我希望自己在群体中是有影响力的人。
options.text_en: I want to be an influential person in a group.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己在群体中是有影响力的人。

options.text: 我做判断时会先看证据和逻辑。
options.text_en: When I judge something, I look first at evidence and logic.
options.text_zh: 我做判断时会先看证据和逻辑。

options.text: 当生活太平淡时，我会觉得少了点什么。
options.text_en: When life feels too plain, I feel something is missing.
options.text_zh: 当生活太平淡时，我会觉得少了点什么。

options.text: 我偶尔会把强硬当成保护自己的方式。
options.text_en: Sometimes I use toughness as a way to protect myself.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会把强硬当成保护自己的方式。

options.text: 我更容易先从关系的角度理解问题。
options.text_en: I am more likely to understand a problem first through relationships.
options.text_zh: 我更容易先从关系的角度理解问题。

options.text: 我更愿意把时间花在能带来产出的事上。
options.text_en: I would rather spend time on things that produce results.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意把时间花在能带来产出的事上。

options.text: 我会自然地关注接下来可能发生什么。
options.text_en: I naturally pay attention to what might happen next.
options.text_zh: 我会自然地关注接下来可能发生什么。

options.text: 我会在意一件事是否足够真、足够有感觉。
options.text_en: I care whether something feels real enough and emotionally alive.
options.text_zh: 我会在意一件事是否足够真、足够有感觉。

options.text: 我不太喜欢拐弯抹角。
options.text_en: I do not like beating around the bush.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢拐弯抹角。

options.text: 我会因为弄懂一件事而感到满足。
options.text_en: I feel satisfied when I understand something clearly.
options.text_zh: 我会因为弄懂一件事而感到满足。

options.text: 我更看重长期的规范，而不是一时的省事。
options.text_en: I value lasting standards more than short-term convenience.
options.text_zh: 我更看重长期的规范，而不是一时的省事。

options.text: 比起抢先出头，我更希望大家都能舒服一点。
options.text_en: Rather than pushing myself forward first, I want everyone to feel comfortable.
options.text_zh: 比起抢先出头，我更希望大家都能舒服一点。

options.text: 我偶尔会因为不想错过而分散了注意力。
options.text_en: Sometimes my attention scatters because I do not want to miss out.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会因为不想错过而分散了注意力。

options.text: 别人退缩不表态时，我会忍不住先出头。
options.text_en: When others hold back and do not take a stand, I tend to step forward first.
options.text_zh: 别人退缩不表态时，我会忍不住先出头。

options.text: 我更习惯先观察，再参与。
options.text_en: I am more used to observing first, then participating.
options.text_zh: 我更习惯先观察，再参与。

options.text: 我更偏好清晰、有标准的做事方式。
options.text_en: I prefer a clear way of doing things with standards.
options.text_zh: 我更偏好清晰、有标准的做事方式。

options.text: 我更相信行动和担当，而不只是讨论。
options.text_en: I trust action and responsibility more than discussion alone.
options.text_zh: 我更相信行动和担当，而不只是讨论。

options.text: 我很看重自己是否对身边人有帮助。
options.text_en: I care a lot about whether I am helpful to the people around me.
options.text_zh: 我很看重自己是否对身边人有帮助。

options.text: 我有时会因为想得太多而行动得慢一点。
options.text_en: Sometimes I act more slowly because I am thinking too much.
options.text_zh: 我有时会因为想得太多而行动得慢一点。

options.text: 别人太随意时，我心里会有点别扭。
options.text_en: When others are too casual, I feel a bit uneasy inside.
options.text_zh: 别人太随意时，我心里会有点别扭。

options.text: 我待人时一般比较温和、好相处。
options.text_en: I am generally gentle and easy to get along with.
options.text_zh: 我待人时一般比较温和、好相处。

options.text: 我待人时会比较体贴和主动。
options.text_en: I tend to be considerate and proactive with people.
options.text_zh: 我待人时会比较体贴和主动。

options.text: 我觉得守住边界和规则很重要。
options.text_en: I think it is important to maintain boundaries and rules.
options.text_zh: 我觉得守住边界和规则很重要。

options.text: 我不太喜欢别人替我做主。
options.text_en: I do not like other people deciding for me.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢别人替我做主。

options.text: 我常通过付出来表达在意。
options.text_en: I often express care by giving to others.
options.text_zh: 我常通过付出来表达在意。

options.text: 我更容易把时间花在研究问题，而不是经营场面。
options.text_en: I am more likely to spend time studying a problem than managing appearances.
options.text_zh: 我更容易把时间花在研究问题，而不是经营场面。

options.text: 我有时会让自己一直处在冲刺状态。
options.text_en: Sometimes I keep myself in a constant sprint.
options.text_zh: 我有时会让自己一直处在冲刺状态。

options.text: 有些情绪一上来，会让我很难一下子抽离。
options.text_en: When certain emotions arise, it is hard for me to step away at once.
options.text_zh: 有些情绪一上来，会让我很难一下子抽离。

options.text: 我不太喜欢把气氛搞得太紧张。
options.text_en: I do not like making the atmosphere too tense.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢把气氛搞得太紧张。

options.text: 我喜欢让一天里有些让人兴奋的东西。
options.text_en: I like having something exciting in the day.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢让一天里有些让人兴奋的东西。

options.text: 我会把维护关系看得比较重要。
options.text_en: I place a lot of importance on maintaining relationships.
options.text_zh: 我会把维护关系看得比较重要。

options.text: 我更安心于有规则、有结构的环境。
options.text_en: I feel safer in an environment with rules and structure.
options.text_zh: 我更安心于有规则、有结构的环境。

options.text: 我对情绪和氛围通常很敏感。
options.text_en: I am usually sensitive to emotions and atmosphere.
options.text_zh: 我对情绪和氛围通常很敏感。

options.text: 我做事时通常很有分寸和原则。
options.text_en: I usually act with restraint and principles.
options.text_zh: 我做事时通常很有分寸和原则。

options.text: 我不太喜欢被沉重的情绪困太久。
options.text_en: I do not like being trapped in heavy emotions for too long.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢被沉重的情绪困太久。

options.text: 我偶尔会把效率看得比感受更重要。
options.text_en: Sometimes I value efficiency more than feelings.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会把效率看得比感受更重要。

options.text: 我希望自己能成为让人感觉温暖的人。
options.text_en: I want to be someone who feels warm to others.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己能成为让人感觉温暖的人。

options.text: 我宁可慢一点，也想找到真正契合自己的东西。
options.text_en: I would rather go slower and find what truly fits me.
options.text_zh: 我宁可慢一点，也想找到真正契合自己的东西。

options.text: 没做出成绩时，我会对自己不太满意。
options.text_en: When I have not achieved results, I feel dissatisfied with myself.
options.text_zh: 没做出成绩时，我会对自己不太满意。

options.text: 没做到自己标准时，我会对自己不太满意。
options.text_en: When I do not meet my own standards, I feel dissatisfied with myself.
options.text_zh: 没做到自己标准时，我会对自己不太满意。

options.text: 对我来说，理解自己的心，比尽快给出结论更重要。
options.text_en: For me, understanding my own heart matters more than reaching a quick conclusion.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，理解自己的心，比尽快给出结论更重要。

options.text: 我通常会把力量感看得很重要。
options.text_en: I usually place a lot of importance on feeling strong.
options.text_zh: 我通常会把力量感看得很重要。

options.text: 我不太喜欢停留在空想里，更想尽快行动。
options.text_en: I do not like staying in daydreams; I want to act as soon as possible.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢停留在空想里，更想尽快行动。

options.text: 我常会主动询问别人需要什么。
options.text_en: I often proactively ask what others need.
options.text_zh: 我常会主动询问别人需要什么。

options.text: 我更容易通过行动争取空间，而不是等别人给。
options.text_en: I am more likely to claim space through action than wait for others to give it.
options.text_zh: 我更容易通过行动争取空间，而不是等别人给。

options.text: 我更在意整体是不是和谐，而不只是我个人有没有赢。
options.text_en: I care more about whether the whole situation is harmonious than whether I personally win.
options.text_zh: 我更在意整体是不是和谐，而不只是我个人有没有赢。

options.text: 我通常会朝着明确目标推进。
options.text_en: I usually move toward clear goals.
options.text_zh: 我通常会朝着明确目标推进。

options.text: 别人需要帮忙时，我通常愿意搭把手。
options.text_en: When others need help, I am usually willing to lend a hand.
options.text_zh: 别人需要帮忙时，我通常愿意搭把手。

options.text: 我做事通常按计划和步骤推进。
options.text_en: I usually work according to a plan and steps.
options.text_zh: 我做事通常按计划和步骤推进。

options.text: 我不太喜欢把自己困在单一选项里。
options.text_en: I do not like trapping myself in a single option.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢把自己困在单一选项里。

options.text: 我会希望自己的付出能被看见。
options.text_en: I want my efforts to be seen.
options.text_zh: 我会希望自己的付出能被看见。

options.text: 我会在意别人是否把我看成有能力的人。
options.text_en: I care whether others see me as capable.
options.text_zh: 我会在意别人是否把我看成有能力的人。

options.text: 我更愿意按照内心感受来理解自己。
options.text_en: I prefer to understand myself through my inner feelings.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意按照内心感受来理解自己。

options.text: 当事情变得沉闷时，我会想办法换个节奏。
options.text_en: When things become dull, I look for a way to change the pace.
options.text_zh: 当事情变得沉闷时，我会想办法换个节奏。

options.text: 我希望自己能成为值得信赖的人。
options.text_en: I want to become someone trustworthy.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己能成为值得信赖的人。

options.text: 遇到机会时，我通常会想办法抓住它。
options.text_en: When an opportunity appears, I usually try to seize it.
options.text_zh: 遇到机会时，我通常会想办法抓住它。

options.text: 对我来说，保留精力和边界很重要。
options.text_en: For me, preserving energy and boundaries is important.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，保留精力和边界很重要。

options.text: 我会想避开让我感到压抑的人和场景。
options.text_en: I want to avoid people and situations that feel oppressive.
options.text_zh: 我会想避开让我感到压抑的人和场景。

options.text: 我更愿意维持一种顺畅、没有太多摩擦的状态。
options.text_en: I prefer to maintain a smooth state with little friction.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意维持一种顺畅、没有太多摩擦的状态。

options.text: 对我来说，成就感往往来自被证明“我做到了”。
options.text_en: For me, achievement often comes from proving that I did it.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，成就感往往来自被证明“我做到了”。

options.text: 我通常更尊重真实的力量，而不是表面的客套。
options.text_en: I usually respect real strength more than surface politeness.
options.text_zh: 我通常更尊重真实的力量，而不是表面的客套。

options.text: 我比较看重长期的稳定感。
options.text_en: I value long-term stability.
options.text_zh: 我比较看重长期的稳定感。

options.text: 我更在意人心有没有被照顾到，而不只是事情有没有完成。
options.text_en: I care whether people's feelings are cared for, not only whether the task is finished.
options.text_zh: 我更在意人心有没有被照顾到，而不只是事情有没有完成。

options.text: 我通常把平静和安稳看得很重要。
options.text_en: I usually value calm and steadiness.
options.text_zh: 我通常把平静和安稳看得很重要。

options.text: 我偶尔会担心自己准备得还不够。
options.text_en: Sometimes I worry that I am not prepared enough.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会担心自己准备得还不够。

options.text: 我有时会觉得自己像个旁观者，融不进眼前的圈子。
options.text_en: Sometimes I feel like an observer who cannot fit into the group in front of me.
options.text_zh: 我有时会觉得自己像个旁观者，融不进眼前的圈子。

options.text: 我更想让日子过得有趣、有活力。
options.text_en: I want life to feel interesting and energetic.
options.text_zh: 我更想让日子过得有趣、有活力。

options.text: 我希望和世界保持一种可观察、可理解的距离。
options.text_en: I want to keep an observable and understandable distance from the world.
options.text_zh: 我希望和世界保持一种可观察、可理解的距离。

options.text: 别人态度强一点时，我可能就让过去了。
options.text_en: When others take a stronger attitude, I may just let it pass.
options.text_zh: 别人态度强一点时，我可能就让过去了。

options.text: 我偶尔会把“被需要”看得太重要。
options.text_en: Sometimes I place too much importance on being needed.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会把“被需要”看得太重要。

options.text: 我宁可慢一点，也希望事情更稳妥、更到位。
options.text_en: I would rather move slower so things are more stable and complete.
options.text_zh: 我宁可慢一点，也希望事情更稳妥、更到位。

options.text: 比起过程是否舒服，我更在意结果是否漂亮。
options.text_en: I care more about whether the result is strong than whether the process is comfortable.
options.text_zh: 比起过程是否舒服，我更在意结果是否漂亮。

options.text: 我通常给人一种稳定、不折腾的感觉。
options.text_en: I usually give people a sense of being stable and low-drama.
options.text_zh: 我通常给人一种稳定、不折腾的感觉。

options.text: 我身上有一股往前冲的劲儿。
options.text_en: I have a drive to push forward.
options.text_zh: 我身上有一股往前冲的劲儿。

options.text: 我会花时间确认一个人或一件事是否值得信任。
options.text_en: I spend time confirming whether a person or situation is trustworthy.
options.text_zh: 我会花时间确认一个人或一件事是否值得信任。

options.text: 我更容易被好玩的事吸引，而不是被责任吓住。
options.text_en: I am more easily drawn by fun things than intimidated by responsibility.
options.text_zh: 我更容易被好玩的事吸引，而不是被责任吓住。

options.text: 我不太喜欢被逼着很快做决定。
options.text_en: I do not like being forced to make decisions quickly.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢被逼着很快做决定。

options.text: 我有时会给自己很强的赢的压力。
options.text_en: Sometimes I put strong pressure on myself to win.
options.text_zh: 我有时会给自己很强的赢的压力。

options.text: 我更容易被有个性、有味道的人事物吸引。
options.text_en: I am more easily attracted to people and things with character and flavor.
options.text_zh: 我更容易被有个性、有味道的人事物吸引。

options.text: 我更容易注意到别人的情绪变化。
options.text_en: I more easily notice changes in other people's emotions.
options.text_zh: 我更容易注意到别人的情绪变化。

options.text: 我不太喜欢让别人看到自己不擅长的一面。
options.text_en: I do not like letting others see what I am not good at.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢让别人看到自己不擅长的一面。

options.text: 我会反复检查，是因为不想出差错。
options.text_en: I check repeatedly because I do not want mistakes.
options.text_zh: 我会反复检查，是因为不想出差错。

options.text: 我更愿意凭理解来建立安全感。
options.text_en: I prefer to build a sense of security through understanding.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意凭理解来建立安全感。

options.text: 我希望自己的人生带着鲜明的个人色彩。
options.text_en: I want my life to carry a distinct personal color.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己的人生带着鲜明的个人色彩。

options.text: 我喜欢先确认计划是否足够周全。
options.text_en: I like to confirm first that a plan is thorough enough.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢先确认计划是否足够周全。

options.text: 我在意自己是否给人留下能干的印象。
options.text_en: I care whether I leave an impression of competence.
options.text_zh: 我在意自己是否给人留下能干的印象。

options.text: 对我来说，“差不多就行”并不容易。
options.text_en: For me, good enough is not easy to accept.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，“差不多就行”并不容易。

options.text: 我有时会为了维持和气而不太表达自己。
options.text_en: Sometimes I hold back from expressing myself to keep the peace.
options.text_zh: 我有时会为了维持和气而不太表达自己。

options.text: 我对“别人都这样”这类理由并不太买账。
options.text_en: I am not very convinced by reasons like everyone does it this way.
options.text_zh: 我对“别人都这样”这类理由并不太买账。

options.text: 我常会通过规划和准备来让自己安心。
options.text_en: I often use planning and preparation to reassure myself.
options.text_zh: 我常会通过规划和准备来让自己安心。

options.text: 我喜欢保持头脑上的清晰和客观。
options.text_en: I like to stay mentally clear and objective.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢保持头脑上的清晰和客观。

options.text: 我更倾向于用平和的方式处理问题。
options.text_en: I tend to handle problems in a calm way.
options.text_zh: 我更倾向于用平和的方式处理问题。

options.text: 我偶尔会觉得自己和周围的人不太一样。
options.text_en: Sometimes I feel different from the people around me.
options.text_zh: 我偶尔会觉得自己和周围的人不太一样。

options.text: 别人不需要我时，我偶尔会有点失落。
options.text_en: Sometimes I feel a little disappointed when others do not need me.
options.text_zh: 别人不需要我时，我偶尔会有点失落。

options.text: 我喜欢把问题拆开来看。
options.text_en: I like to break problems apart and examine them.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢把问题拆开来看。

options.text: 我习惯在不确定时尽快做出判断。
options.text_en: When things are uncertain, I tend to make a judgment quickly.
options.text_zh: 我习惯在不确定时尽快做出判断。

options.text: 我内心的体验通常比较丰富。
options.text_en: My inner experience is usually quite rich.
options.text_zh: 我内心的体验通常比较丰富。

options.text: 我通常会为不确定的情况先做准备。
options.text_en: I usually prepare in advance for uncertain situations.
options.text_zh: 我通常会为不确定的情况先做准备。

options.text: 如果别人对我冷淡，我会有点在意。
options.text_en: If others are cold toward me, I care about it.
options.text_zh: 如果别人对我冷淡，我会有点在意。

options.text: 看到不规范的地方，我会忍不住想纠正。
options.text_en: When I see something irregular, I cannot help wanting to correct it.
options.text_zh: 看到不规范的地方，我会忍不住想纠正。

options.text: 我更容易去适应环境，而不是强行改变环境。
options.text_en: I am more likely to adapt to an environment than force it to change.
options.text_zh: 我更容易去适应环境，而不是强行改变环境。

options.text: 我更愿意主动掌控，而不是被动等待。
options.text_en: I prefer to take control proactively rather than wait passively.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意主动掌控，而不是被动等待。

options.text: 我往往能在事情里看到值得期待的一面。
options.text_en: I can often see something worth looking forward to in a situation.
options.text_zh: 我往往能在事情里看到值得期待的一面。

options.text: 我愿意承认自己复杂的一面。
options.text_en: I am willing to acknowledge the complex side of myself.
options.text_zh: 我愿意承认自己复杂的一面。

options.text: 我宁可忙一点，也不想长期停滞不前。
options.text_en: I would rather be a little busy than remain stuck for a long time.
options.text_zh: 我宁可忙一点，也不想长期停滞不前。

options.text: 我希望自己是能扛事、能做主的人。
options.text_en: I want to be someone who can carry responsibility and make decisions.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己是能扛事、能做主的人。

options.text: 我习惯先完成分内该做的事。
options.text_en: I tend to finish what is my responsibility first.
options.text_zh: 我习惯先完成分内该做的事。

options.text: 我不太喜欢太过千篇一律的状态。
options.text_en: I do not like states that feel too uniform or repetitive.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢太过千篇一律的状态。

options.text: 我喜欢从复杂信息里梳理出规律。
options.text_en: I like finding patterns in complex information.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢从复杂信息里梳理出规律。

options.text: 我会认真守住自己该负的责任。
options.text_en: I take seriously the responsibilities I should carry.
options.text_zh: 我会认真守住自己该负的责任。

options.text: 我有时会把责任扛得太满。
options.text_en: Sometimes I take on too much responsibility.
options.text_zh: 我有时会把责任扛得太满。

options.text: 我有时会因为太直接而让人有压力。
options.text_en: Sometimes I put pressure on others by being too direct.
options.text_zh: 我有时会因为太直接而让人有压力。

options.text: 我喜欢成为别人可以依靠的人。
options.text_en: I like being someone others can rely on.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢成为别人可以依靠的人。

options.text: 我做事时通常不急着抢主导权。
options.text_en: When doing things, I usually do not rush to take the lead.
options.text_zh: 我做事时通常不急着抢主导权。

options.text: 我很看重一个人是否活得真诚、有自我。
options.text_en: I care a lot about whether a person lives sincerely and with a sense of self.
options.text_zh: 我很看重一个人是否活得真诚、有自我。

options.text: 我希望自己是高效、能成事的人。
options.text_en: I want to be efficient and able to make things happen.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己是高效、能成事的人。

options.text: 我有时会先追求感觉好，再考虑别的。
options.text_en: Sometimes I pursue what feels good first and consider other things later.
options.text_zh: 我有时会先追求感觉好，再考虑别的。

options.text: 我有时会先想到最坏的可能。
options.text_en: Sometimes I think of the worst possibility first.
options.text_zh: 我有时会先想到最坏的可能。

options.text: 我更希望被理解成真正的我，而不只是一个标签。
options.text_en: I want to be understood as my real self, not just as a label.
options.text_zh: 我更希望被理解成真正的我，而不只是一个标签。

options.text: 我不太喜欢被卷进强烈的对立里。
options.text_en: I do not like being pulled into intense opposition.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢被卷进强烈的对立里。

options.text: 我更愿意把话摊开说清楚。
options.text_en: I would rather put things on the table and speak clearly.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意把话摊开说清楚。

options.text: 我会主动寻找让自己更进一步的机会。
options.text_en: I actively look for opportunities to move myself further.
options.text_zh: 我会主动寻找让自己更进一步的机会。

options.text: 我更愿意把注意力放在下一件值得期待的事上。
options.text_en: I prefer to put my attention on the next thing worth looking forward to.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意把注意力放在下一件值得期待的事上。

options.text: 对我来说，心里没那么多波澜本身就是一种舒服。
options.text_en: For me, having fewer emotional waves inside is comfortable in itself.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，心里没那么多波澜本身就是一种舒服。

options.text: 我通常愿意为关系多付出一点。
options.text_en: I am usually willing to give a little more for relationships.
options.text_zh: 我通常愿意为关系多付出一点。

options.text: 遇到问题时，我往往会主动顶上去。
options.text_en: When problems arise, I tend to step up proactively.
options.text_zh: 遇到问题时，我往往会主动顶上去。

options.text: 我会先评估自己是否有足够的信息再表态。
options.text_en: I first assess whether I have enough information before taking a position.
options.text_zh: 我会先评估自己是否有足够的信息再表态。

options.text: 我通常不想在低落情绪里停太久。
options.text_en: I usually do not want to stay in low moods for too long.
options.text_zh: 我通常不想在低落情绪里停太久。

options.text: 我做事前会习惯先看风险和后果。
options.text_en: Before acting, I tend to look at risks and consequences first.
options.text_zh: 我做事前会习惯先看风险和后果。

options.text: 我很重视人与人之间的温度。
options.text_en: I care a lot about warmth between people.
options.text_zh: 我很重视人与人之间的温度。

options.text: 对我来说，知道为什么，往往和知道做什么一样重要。
options.text_en: For me, knowing why is often as important as knowing what to do.
options.text_zh: 对我来说，知道为什么，往往和知道做什么一样重要。

options.text: 我更愿意正面碰撞，也不想委屈着绕过去。
options.text_en: I would rather face things directly than bend around them while feeling wronged.
options.text_zh: 我更愿意正面碰撞，也不想委屈着绕过去。

options.text: 我会为重要目标持续投入精力。
options.text_en: I keep investing energy in important goals.
options.text_zh: 我会为重要目标持续投入精力。

options.text: 我不喜欢把关系弄得很僵。
options.text_en: I do not like making relationships become rigid or strained.
options.text_zh: 我不喜欢把关系弄得很僵。

options.text: 我希望自己活得端正、有标准。
options.text_en: I want to live with integrity and standards.
options.text_zh: 我希望自己活得端正、有标准。

options.text: 比起先看风险，我更容易先看机会。
options.text_en: Rather than looking at risks first, I more easily see opportunities first.
options.text_zh: 比起先看风险，我更容易先看机会。

options.text: 我通常能察觉哪里可能不太对劲。
options.text_en: I can usually sense where something may not be right.
options.text_zh: 我通常能察觉哪里可能不太对劲。

options.text: 我通常会在关键时刻站出来。
options.text_en: I usually stand up at key moments.
options.text_zh: 我通常会在关键时刻站出来。

options.text: 我会习惯给自己设定阶段性目标。
options.text_en: I tend to set staged goals for myself.
options.text_zh: 我会习惯给自己设定阶段性目标。

options.text: 我希望表达出来的东西是有我自己痕迹的。
options.text_en: I want what I express to carry my own mark.
options.text_zh: 我希望表达出来的东西是有我自己痕迹的。

options.text: 我说话做事通常比较直接。
options.text_en: I usually speak and act directly.
options.text_zh: 我说话做事通常比较直接。

options.text: 我不太能接受明知不对还将就。
options.text_en: I have trouble accepting something I know is wrong and settling for it anyway.
options.text_zh: 我不太能接受明知不对还将就。

options.text: 我不太喜欢频繁改变已经熟悉的做法。
options.text_en: I do not like frequently changing ways of doing things that are already familiar.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢频繁改变已经熟悉的做法。

options.text: 我不太想把自己活成一个“标准答案”。
options.text_en: I do not want to live as a standard answer.
options.text_zh: 我不太想把自己活成一个“标准答案”。

options.text: 我不太喜欢自己在关系里是可有可无的。
options.text_en: I do not like feeling optional in a relationship.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢自己在关系里是可有可无的。

options.text: 面对不确定时，我心里会先拉起警报。
options.text_en: When facing uncertainty, an alarm goes off inside me first.
options.text_zh: 面对不确定时，我心里会先拉起警报。

options.text: 我通常会把自由感看得很重要。
options.text_en: I usually place a lot of importance on a sense of freedom.
options.text_zh: 我通常会把自由感看得很重要。

options.text: 我更容易被内心的共鸣打动，而不是表面的标准答案。
options.text_en: I am more moved by inner resonance than by surface-level standard answers.
options.text_zh: 我更容易被内心的共鸣打动，而不是表面的标准答案。

options.text: 我喜欢先把流程理顺再行动。
options.text_en: I like to sort out the process before acting.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢先把流程理顺再行动。

options.text: 我做事时会先考虑这会不会影响别人。
options.text_en: When I do things, I first consider whether they will affect others.
options.text_zh: 我做事时会先考虑这会不会影响别人。

options.text: 我不太习惯把脆弱轻易露出来。
options.text_en: I am not used to showing vulnerability easily.
options.text_zh: 我不太习惯把脆弱轻易露出来。

options.text: 我会希望自己的努力是被看见、被认可的。
options.text_en: I want my efforts to be seen and recognized.
options.text_zh: 我会希望自己的努力是被看见、被认可的。

options.text: 我能感受到别人不太会留意到的细微情绪。
options.text_en: I can sense subtle emotions that others may not notice.
options.text_zh: 我能感受到别人不太会留意到的细微情绪。

options.text: 我能长时间专注在自己感兴趣的问题上。
options.text_en: I can focus for a long time on problems that interest me.
options.text_zh: 我能长时间专注在自己感兴趣的问题上。

options.text: 我不太愿意把自己长期困在无聊和受限里。
options.text_en: I am not willing to keep myself trapped in boredom and restriction for long.
options.text_zh: 我不太愿意把自己长期困在无聊和受限里。

options.text: 面对分歧时，我会先想办法缓一缓。
options.text_en: When facing disagreement, I first try to slow things down.
options.text_zh: 面对分歧时，我会先想办法缓一缓。

options.text: 我很自然地会去照顾身边的人。
options.text_en: I naturally take care of the people around me.
options.text_zh: 我很自然地会去照顾身边的人。

options.text: 我很在意把事情做对。
options.text_en: I care a lot about doing things correctly.
options.text_zh: 我很在意把事情做对。

options.text: 我有时会顺着别人走，却没那么清楚自己想要什么。
options.text_en: Sometimes I go along with others without being very clear about what I want.
options.text_zh: 我有时会顺着别人走，却没那么清楚自己想要什么。

options.text: 如果没有想明白，我不太愿意仓促表态。
options.text_en: If I have not thought it through, I do not like taking a position in a hurry.
options.text_zh: 如果没有想明白，我不太愿意仓促表态。

options.text: 我遇到冲突时，通常不会退得太快。
options.text_en: When I encounter conflict, I usually do not back down too quickly.
options.text_zh: 我遇到冲突时，通常不会退得太快。

options.text: 我常会把他人的需要放进自己的安排里。
options.text_en: I often include other people's needs in my own plans.
options.text_zh: 我常会把他人的需要放进自己的安排里。

options.text: 我喜欢看到自己不断向上移动。
options.text_en: I like seeing myself keep moving upward.
options.text_zh: 我喜欢看到自己不断向上移动。

options.text: 我宁可往前试一试，也不太想被困在原地。
options.text_en: I would rather try moving forward than stay stuck in place.
options.text_zh: 我宁可往前试一试，也不太想被困在原地。

options.text: 我会对失去的人或事停留很久。
options.text_en: I may linger for a long time on people or things I have lost.
options.text_zh: 我会对失去的人或事停留很久。

options.text: 我不太喜欢别人突然闯进我的节奏里。
options.text_en: I do not like others suddenly intruding into my rhythm.
options.text_zh: 我不太喜欢别人突然闯进我的节奏里。

options.text: 我通常会先看怎么避免冲突升级。
options.text_en: I usually first look for how to prevent conflict from escalating.
options.text_zh: 我通常会先看怎么避免冲突升级。

options.text: 我会把保护已有的东西看得很重要。
options.text_en: I place a lot of importance on protecting what already exists.
options.text_zh: 我会把保护已有的东西看得很重要。
